ops.title: P3: drain engine (v0.2 branch)
ops.description: drain.Transition (normative order: draining flag → stop AND close intake → settle running+queued → snapshot journal → truncate canonical → bind drain listener → release flock → spawn), tri-state Liveness, Resources seam {Keys,AttestIdle,Seize,Yield,Restore} with abort-and-Restore, disk-backed StrikeStore, monotone-seq CAS journal, ScanPeers/AdoptDead unconditional cold-start, drain.Simple (admission = frame receipt), Takeover ladder + SkewWatch. Built on unreleased v0.2 branch; fusekit Track F pins the commit; v0.2 tagged only when both gates green. Escalate fable on fence/ordering miss; codex refuter on transition ordering.

ops.text: Crash-point-injection tests after every Transition step assert single-ownership; paused-handler-across-barrier test green

All adversarial branches from plan Verification #3 covered (Undetermined/no-force, ESRCH-as-success, pid+start_time revalidation, lost fence, busy-teardown Restore, cold-start adoption, persisted strikes)
codex refuter pass on transition ordering complete
